feature_tested: Admin Command Center - User Onboarding, Outlet Management, Commissary, Data Import, Report Export
summary: All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified Admin Command Center panel with all 5 tabs: Users (7), Outlets (5), Commissary, Data Import, Report Export. All features working correctly including AI production forecasting with moon cycle factor.

endpoints: GET /api/export/formats - Returns formats (pdf, csv, xlsx), report_types (pnl, invoice, budget, daily_flash, vendor_comparison, outlet_health), paper_sizes (letter, a4, legal, tabloid), orientations (portrait, landscape), margin_presets (normal, narrow, wide)
POST /api/export/report (format=pdf) - Returns print-ready HTML with @page CSS, P&L data, LUCCCA branding
POST /api/export/report (format=csv) - Returns CSV file with GL entries, Content-Disposition: attachment

POST /api/commissary/forecast-production?outlet_id=main-dining&days_ahead=1 - Returns forecast with moon_phase (waning_crescent), moon_impact, season_factor, forecast_covers, item_forecast with production_qty
POST /api/commissary/config - Creates commissary relationship between outlets (main-kitchen → pool-cafe)
GET /api/commissary/configs - Lists all commissary relationships with producing_name, receiving_name
POST /api/onboarding/start - Creates onboarding session with session_id, steps tracking (vendors, employees, gl_codes, menus)
GET /api/admin/users - Returns 7 seeded users with roles (owner, gm, exec_chef, pastry_chef, bar_manager, events_director, controller), outlet_ids, is_admin, active status
GET /api/admin/outlets - Returns 5 seeded outlets with outlet_id, name, type, manager
POST /api/export/report (report_type=daily_flash, format=pdf) - Daily flash report export
POST /api/export/report (report_type=vendor_comparison, format=csv) - Vendor comparison CSV export

verified_elements: Admin Command Center panel loads with data-testid='admin-command-panel'
Subtitle shows 'User Onboarding • Outlet Management • Commissary • Data Import • Report Export'
Data Import tab visible and clickable
Report Export tab visible and clickable
Users tab shows team members table with Name, Role, Department, Outlets, Admin, Status columns
Users tab shows roles: OWNER, GM, EXEC_CHEF, PASTRY_CHEF, BAR_MANAGER, EVENTS_DIRECTOR, CONTROLLER
Users tab shows ADMIN badges for admin users
Users tab shows Add User form with Full Name, Email, Department, Role, Admin Access fields
Outlets tab shows outlets table with Name, Type, GL Code, Manager, Capacity, Status columns
Report Export tab shows 5 select elements: Report, Format, Paper Size, Orientation, Margins
Report Export tab shows Export Report button
Data Import tab shows import cards for Vendor, Employee, GL Code, Menu imports

critical_code_review_comments: Universal Report Export Engine correctly generates print-ready HTML with @page CSS for PDF printing
Commissary AI production forecast includes moon cycle factor (waning_crescent = -2% impact) as user's 'secret weapon'
Onboarding wizard CSV import supports vendors, employees, GL codes, menus with proper template headers
Admin users auto-seeded with 7 users across different roles and outlet assignments
Admin outlets auto-seeded with 5 outlets (Main Kitchen, Pastry Shop, Pier 66 Restaurant, Rooftop Bar, Grand Banquet Hall, Pool Bar)
test_credentials: No auth required - dev mode. Admin users seeded: owner (James Wellington III), gm (Sarah Mitchell), exec_chef (Maria Santos), pastry_chef (Marie Laurent), bar_manager (Jake Morrison), events_director (Michelle Mayor), controller (David Chen)
seed_data_creation: Admin users and outlets auto-seeded on first API request. 7 users with various roles, 5 outlets with different types.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Command Center fully functional. All 5 tabs working: Users (7), Outlets (5), Commissary, Data Import, Report Export. Commissary forecast uses moon cycle factor. Report export generates print-ready HTML for PDF. CSV import templates available for vendors, employees, GL codes, menus. Toast POS and QuickBooks remain MOCKED. Weather API in commissary forecast is simulated (always 1.0).
